prompt: A kawaii pastel pet care app UI featuring rounded corners, soft pink gradients, animated pet avatars, and cloud-shaped notification bubbles for feeding reminders
prompt_refined: A kawaii pastel pet care mobile application UI screen. The interface design prominently features rounded corners on all buttons, cards, and interactive elements. Soft pink gradients provide a gentle background and fill various UI components. The screen displays multiple animated pet avatars as part of user profiles or status updates. Cloud-shaped notification bubbles, clearly indicating feeding reminders, are visible, gently appearing or floating within the layout.
objects: Interactive UI elements with rounded corners
